# Juan Camilo Posada (Choko)

> AI-native software engineer. Ships AI in production. CTO at ELSA 360 (early-stage AI coaching
> platform for endurance athletes); previously Solutions Engineer at Fuse (US lending automation)
> and Interim Frontend Lead at Astropay (LATAM payments). Trilingual: Spanish (native), English
> (C1), German (B2). Remote-first, open to relocate.

## What he does
- Builds and runs an OS-agnostic agent fleet: an orchestrator plus eight specialists, ~50 in-house
  skills, branch-safety hooks, a routing contract tested in CI. 5 to 10 agents in parallel.
- Roughly 3x per-engineer throughput; 60+ pull requests merged in six weeks, frontend to
  infrastructure, under 18h open-to-merge.
- Stood up a subscription billing foundation end to end in 48 hours (17 tests, 4 critical paths).
- 270+ production lending workflows at ~99.5% job-success; built a 25-agent customer-support
  team's daily workspace (handle time cut ~30%).

## Stack
TypeScript, Node.js, NestJS, Express, React, Vite, PostgreSQL, AWS (Lambda, SQS, S3, CloudWatch),
Docker, Drizzle, Claude Agent SDK, GitHub Actions, PostHog.
